whyUs.title: Why Watu Care
whyUs.subtitle: We connect healthcare providers with quality medical supplies from Asia.
whyUs.hubDesc: Products ship directly from certified Asian manufacturers to healthcare facilities across Africa and the Middle East — no intermediary, no extra costs.
whyUs.directDesc: We work directly with manufacturers to ensure quality products and competitive pricing.
whyUs.serviceDesc: Quick quote turnaround and dedicated support throughout your order process.
whyUs.catalogDesc: Comprehensive range of medical supplies across multiple categories to meet your facility's needs.

categories.title: Our Products
categories.subtitle: Explore our range of medical supplies from Asian manufacturers.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Medical supply solutions across specialized categories
products.metaDescription: Browse 500+ wholesale medical products across 10 categories. PPE, surgical supplies, gloves, and clinical consumables from certified Asian manufacturers. Request a free B2B quote.
products.findInRegionSubtitle: We deliver {category} to healthcare facilities across Africa and the Middle East.

gloves.title: Gloves
gloves.description: Examination and surgical gloves in latex, nitrile, and vinyl.
gloves.longDescription: Full range of medical gloves including latex, nitrile, and vinyl options. Available in examination and sterile surgical grades, powdered or powder-free, for all clinical settings.

faq.q: What types of medical gloves do you supply?
faq.a: We supply latex, nitrile, and vinyl gloves in both examination and sterile surgical grades. Options include powdered and powder-free varieties in sizes from XS to XL.

faq.q: What is the minimum order quantity for wholesale gloves?
faq.a: Minimum order quantities start at 1,000 boxes (100 gloves per box). Contact us for a custom quote based on your facility's volume needs.

faq.q: Are your gloves CE and ISO certified?
faq.a: Yes, all gloves are sourced from certified Asian manufacturers and meet CE marking and ISO 13485 quality management standards for medical devices.

infection-prevention-ppe.title: Infection Prevention & PPE
infection-prevention-ppe.description: Gowns, caps, masks, and protective equipment for infection control.
infection-prevention-ppe.longDescription: Comprehensive personal protective equipment for healthcare workers. Includes surgical gowns, isolation gowns, caps, masks, face shields, and shoe covers to maintain sterile environments and prevent cross-contamination.

faq.q: What PPE products are available for healthcare facilities?
faq.a: Our PPE range includes surgical gowns, isolation gowns, bouffant caps, face masks, face shields, shoe covers, and full-body coveralls. All products meet international infection control standards.

faq.q: Can I order custom PPE kits for my hospital?
faq.a: Yes, we can assemble custom PPE kits tailored to your facility's protocols. Contact our team with your requirements for a customized quote.

faq.q: What certifications do your PPE products carry?
faq.a: Our PPE products carry CE marking and comply with ISO 13485. Surgical gowns meet AAMI level standards for fluid resistance and barrier protection.

bodily-waste-management.title: Bodily Waste & Excreta Management
bodily-waste-management.description: Liners, bedpans, absorbent pads, and drainage systems for patient care.
bodily-waste-management.longDescription: Hygienic waste management solutions for patient care, including absorbent liners for commodes and bedpans, super absorbent pads, disposable and reusable bedpans, and urine drainage systems.

faq.q: What waste management products do you offer for hospitals?
faq.a: We supply absorbent liners for commodes and bedpans, super absorbent pads, disposable and reusable bedpans, and closed urine drainage systems designed for hygienic patient care.

faq.q: Are your waste management products suitable for long-term care facilities?
faq.a: Yes, our range includes both disposable and reusable options suited for long-term care, rehabilitation centers, and acute care settings.

faq.q: How do you ensure hygiene standards in waste management products?
faq.a: All products are individually sealed and manufactured under ISO 13485 quality management systems. Super absorbent pads feature odor-control technology for patient dignity.

surgical.title: Surgical & Procedure Packs
surgical.description: Pre-assembled sterile packs and drapes for surgical procedures.
surgical.longDescription: Complete range of sterile surgical packs including procedure-specific kits, drapes, and warming blankets. Available in standard and custom configurations to match your facility protocols.

faq.q: Can surgical packs be customized to our procedures?
faq.a: Yes, we offer custom surgical pack configurations tailored to your specific procedure protocols. Provide your specifications and we will assemble packs to match your OR requirements.

faq.q: What types of surgical drapes are included?
faq.a: Our range includes universal drapes, fenestrated drapes, split drapes, and procedure-specific drapes for orthopedic, cardiovascular, and general surgery. All are sterile and single-use.

faq.q: How are sterile surgical packs shipped?
faq.a: All packs are double-wrapped and sealed in sterile packaging. Shipping containers are temperature and humidity controlled to maintain sterility throughout the supply chain.

wound-care.title: Wound Care & Dressing
wound-care.description: Dressings, swabs, drainage systems, and wound closure products.
wound-care.longDescription: Comprehensive wound care solutions including hydrocolloid and foam dressings, gauze swabs, wound drainage systems, and adhesive bandages. Designed for optimal healing and infection prevention.

faq.q: What wound dressing types are available?
faq.a: We supply hydrocolloid dressings, foam dressings, alginate dressings, gauze swabs, adhesive bandages, and transparent film dressings. Each type is designed for specific wound stages and clinical needs.

faq.q: Do you supply wound drainage systems?
faq.a: Yes, we offer closed wound drainage systems including Jackson-Pratt style drains. All systems are sterile, single-use, and designed for safe post-operative fluid management.

faq.q: Can I order wound care products in bulk for a hospital network?
faq.a: Absolutely. We provide volume-based pricing for hospital networks and group purchasing organizations. Contact us for a tailored wholesale quote.

clinical-consumables.title: Clinical Consumables
clinical-consumables.description: Syringes, specimen containers, and everyday clinical supplies.
clinical-consumables.longDescription: Essential clinical consumables for daily healthcare operations, including syringes of all types, specimen containers, blood collection needles, ECG accessories, and disposable instruments.

faq.q: What clinical consumables do you stock?
faq.a: Our range covers syringes (Luer lock and Luer slip), specimen containers, blood collection needles and tubes, ECG electrodes, disposable forceps, and other everyday clinical supplies.

faq.q: Are syringes available in all common sizes?
faq.a: Yes, we supply syringes from 1 mL to 60 mL in both Luer lock and Luer slip configurations, with or without needles attached.

faq.q: How quickly can consumables be restocked?
faq.a: Standard lead time is 2 to 4 weeks for wholesale orders. We maintain buffer stock for high-demand items and can arrange expedited shipping for urgent needs.

vascular-access-catheters.title: Vascular Access & Catheters
vascular-access-catheters.description: Central venous catheters, hemodialysis catheters, and Foley catheters.
vascular-access-catheters.longDescription: Advanced vascular access products including central venous catheters with anti-infection coating, hemodialysis catheters, and Foley urinary catheters. Designed for patient safety and reduced infection risk.

faq.q: What catheter types do you supply?
faq.a: We supply central venous catheters (single, double, and triple lumen), hemodialysis catheters, and Foley urinary catheters in silicone and latex. Anti-infection coated options are available.

faq.q: Do your catheters meet international safety standards?
faq.a: Yes, all catheters are CE marked and manufactured under ISO 13485 quality systems. Anti-infection variants use proven antimicrobial coatings to reduce catheter-related bloodstream infections.

faq.q: What sizes and configurations are available?
faq.a: Catheters are available in French sizes from 5Fr to 24Fr depending on the type. Foley catheters come in 2-way and 3-way configurations with various balloon volumes.

airway-respiratory.title: Airway & Respiratory
airway-respiratory.description: Endotracheal tubes, breathing circuits, masks, and respiratory equipment.
airway-respiratory.longDescription: Full selection of airway management and respiratory products including endotracheal tubes, suction catheters, breathing circuits, nebulizer masks, stethoscopes, and oxygen masks. Multiple sizes for pediatric to adult patients.

faq.q: What airway management products are available?
faq.a: We supply endotracheal tubes (cuffed and uncuffed), suction catheters, breathing circuits, Guedel airways, laryngeal mask airways, and tracheostomy tubes in pediatric to adult sizes.

faq.q: Do you carry pediatric respiratory equipment?
faq.a: Yes, our respiratory range includes pediatric-specific sizes for endotracheal tubes, nebulizer masks, breathing circuits, and oxygen masks, starting from neonatal sizes.

faq.q: Are breathing circuits available in different configurations?
faq.a: We offer corrugated breathing circuits in both reusable and single-use options, with and without water traps, in adult and pediatric lengths.

surgical-instruments-sutures.title: Surgical Instruments & Sutures
surgical-instruments-sutures.description: Surgical blades, sutures, and electrosurgical instruments.
surgical-instruments-sutures.longDescription: Precision surgical instruments and sutures for operative procedures. Includes disposable surgical blades, absorbable and non-absorbable sutures, and electrosurgical pencils.

faq.q: What suture types do you supply?
faq.a: We supply both absorbable sutures (polyglycolic acid, chromic catgut) and non-absorbable sutures (nylon, silk, polypropylene) in various needle configurations and gauge sizes.

faq.q: Are disposable surgical blades available in all standard sizes?
faq.a: Yes, we stock disposable surgical blades in sizes 10, 11, 12, 15, 20, 21, 22, 23, and 24 compatible with standard scalpel handles.

faq.q: Do you offer electrosurgical equipment?
faq.a: We supply disposable electrosurgical pencils with both button and rocker switch activation, along with grounding pads and accessories for monopolar and bipolar procedures.

patient-care-equipment.title: Patient Care & Basic Equipment
patient-care-equipment.description: Thermometers, blood pressure monitors, wheelchairs, and mobility aids.
patient-care-equipment.longDescription: Essential patient care and basic medical equipment including diagnostic devices, monitoring instruments, wheelchairs, and mobility aids for healthcare facilities.

faq.q: What diagnostic equipment do you supply?
faq.a: We supply digital thermometers, blood pressure monitors (manual and automatic), pulse oximeters, stethoscopes, and basic patient monitoring instruments for clinical use.

faq.q: Are wheelchairs and mobility aids included in your catalog?
faq.a: Yes, we offer standard and lightweight wheelchairs, walking frames, crutches, and other mobility aids suitable for hospitals and rehabilitation centers.

faq.q: Can equipment be ordered in bulk for new facility outfitting?
faq.a: Absolutely. We provide volume pricing for new facility setups and can supply full equipment packages tailored to your ward or department needs.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to get the medical supplies you need.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Tell us what you need — products, quantities, and delivery destination. Our form takes under 2 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Within 48 hours, receive a detailed quote including product pricing, shipping options, and delivery timeline.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We manage everything — manufacturer coordination, quality checks, and logistics — until your order is delivered.

hero.title: About Watu Care
hero.subtitle: Connecting healthcare providers with quality medical supplies.

values.title: And who are we?
values.subtitle: We are Medical Device Supply Experts, operating across Asia, Africa and the Middle East.
values.mission: Our mission is to enable sustainable access to essential medical devices through compliant sourcing, structured supply chains and strong partnerships.
values.qualityDesc: We work exclusively with approved and trusted manufacturers in Asia, ensuring medical devices that meet international standards and deliver consistent, reliable performance.
values.reliabilityDesc: Our sourcing model is built directly with selected manufacturers, allowing us to ensure full traceability, controlled logistics and dependable delivery across Africa and the Middle East.
values.supportDesc: From quotation to delivery, our team supports you at every step with responsiveness, clarity and long-term commitment.

mission.title: Why
mission.subtitle: "Watu" means People in Swahili — and that is exactly what drives us.
mission.description1: Watu Care was born from a simple belief:
mission.highlight1: healthcare should never be limited by geography, origin or background
mission.highlight2: access to essential medical supplies should be possible for everyone, everywhere
mission.description2: Our team comes from different countries, cultures and professional paths, but we share one common purpose — to make access to essential medical supplies possible for everyone, everywhere.
mission.asiaHubDesc: We connect certified Asian manufacturers directly to healthcare facilities — products ship straight from the source.
mission.healthcareFocusDesc: At Watu Care, we believe healthcare is, above all, a human story.
mission.developingEconomiesDesc: We serve healthcare facilities across Africa and the Middle East.
mission.story1: Watu Care was born from a simple belief: healthcare should never be limited by geography, origin or background.
mission.story2: Our team comes from different countries, cultures and professional paths, but we share one common purpose - to make access to essential medical supplies possible for everyone, everywhere.
mission.story3: At Watu Care, we believe healthcare is, above all, a human story.
mission.story4: Behind every medical device, every order and every shipment, there is a healthcare professional doing their best — and a patient hoping for better care.
mission.story5: "Watu" reminds us every day that people come first.
mission.story6: Not markets. Not volumes. Not margins.
mission.story7: But doctors, nurses, buyers, logisticians — and the patients they serve.
mission.story8: At Watu Care, we don't just move products. We build bridges between people, markets, and better healthcare.

valueProps.title: Why Partner with Watu Care?
valueProps.subtitle: We connect healthcare providers with quality medical supplies.
valueProps.qualityFirstDesc: We work exclusively with approved and trusted manufacturers in Asia, ensuring medical devices that meet international standards and deliver consistent, reliable performance.
valueProps.priceCommitmentDesc: We are committed to fair, stable and transparent pricing. By working directly with manufacturers and optimizing our sourcing model, we ensure cost-efficiency without compromising on quality or compliance.
valueProps.supplyChainDesc: Our sourcing model is built directly with selected manufacturers, allowing us to ensure full traceability, controlled logistics and dependable delivery across Africa and the Middle East.
valueProps.rdFocusDesc: We actively collaborate with our manufacturing partners on product improvement, adaptation to local needs and regulatory alignment. Our R&D approach ensures that devices are not only compliant, but also relevant, practical and scalable for the markets we serve.
valueProps.humanSupportDesc: From quotation to delivery, our team supports you at every step with responsiveness, clarity and long-term commitment.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about working with Watu Care.
faq.moqQuestion: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faq.moqAnswer: MOQ varies by product category. For most items, we work with quantities suitable for healthcare facilities of all sizes. Contact us with your specific needs and we'll provide tailored options.
faq.deliveryAnswer: Delivery timelines depend on the shipping method you choose. Sea freight usually takes around 30–50 days, while air freight options allow delivery within 6–9 days.
faq.regionsQuestion: Which regions do you deliver to?
faq.regionsAnswer: We deliver to healthcare facilities across Africa and the Middle East, and we can also provide quotations for other countries worldwide upon request. Our team supports international shipments through reliable logistics partners, ensuring efficient and well-managed delivery wherever our clients operate.
faq.certificationsQuestion: What certifications do your products have?
faq.certificationsAnswer: Our products come from manufacturers that meet international quality standards including CE marking and ISO certifications. We can provide specific certification documents upon request.
faq.paymentQuestion: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentAnswer: We accept bank transfers (T/T) and letters of credit (L/C) for larger orders. Payment terms are discussed during the quotation process based on order size and relationship.
faq.supportQuestion: What after-sales support do you provide?
faq.supportAnswer: Our team provides support throughout the order process and after delivery. We assist with product inquiries, documentation, and any issues that may arise with your order.

meta.title: Frequently Asked Questions

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Watu Care ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This policy explains how we handle information when you use our website.

collect.title: Information We Collect
collect.content: We collect information you provide when requesting quotes, including your name, email address, organization, and product requirements. We also collect standard website usage data through cookies and analytics.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.content: We use your information to respond to quote requests, communicate about orders, improve our services, and send relevant product updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.content: We may share your information with manufacturing partners solely to fulfill orders. We may also share data when required by law or to protect our rights.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for website functionality and analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our site. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data. Our website uses HTTPS encryption for all data transmission.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, contact us at contact@watu-care.com.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Watu Care terms of service for B2B medical wholesale.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the Watu Care website and services. By using our website, you agree to these terms.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Watu Care provides B2B medical supply wholesale services. All products are intended for professional healthcare use. Pricing is quote-based and subject to order volume, product selection, and delivery destination.

quotes.title: Quotes and Orders
quotes.content: Quote requests are not binding. Pricing and availability are confirmed upon formal quotation. Orders are subject to our acceptance and product availability from manufacturing partners.

products.title: Products and Quality
products.content: We source products from manufacturers meeting international quality standards (CE, ISO). Product specifications and certifications are provided upon request. Images on our website are representative and actual products may vary slightly.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Watu Care acts as a wholesale distributor. While we ensure quality sourcing, product liability follows applicable manufacturer warranties and international trade terms agreed upon in each order.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on this website, including text, images, and branding, is owned by Watu Care. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Hong Kong SAR. Disputes will be resolved through arbitration in Hong Kong.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Questions about these terms can be directed to contact@watu-care.com.

meta.title: Medical Supplies for Hospitals — Wholesale from Asia

hero.title: Medical Supplies for Hospitals
hero.subtitle: Trusted by hospital procurement teams across Africa and the Middle East. Direct sourcing from certified manufacturers — no intermediaries, no inflated costs.

items.title: Supply Chain Gaps
items.description: Unreliable local distributors create critical shortages. We ship directly from manufacturers, bypassing fragile local supply chains.

items.title: Budget Pressure
items.description: Hospital procurement faces constant cost constraints. Our direct-from-manufacturer model removes distributor markups.

items.title: Quality Compliance
items.description: Ensuring products meet WHO and local regulatory standards is non-negotiable. All our suppliers hold ISO 13485 certification.

items.title: Slow Quote Processes
items.description: Procurement cycles lose time waiting for supplier responses. We respond to all quote requests within 48 hours.

items.title: Bulk Order Management
items.description: Handle large-volume, multi-SKU orders with a single point of contact and consolidated shipping.

items.title: Certified Products
items.description: ISO 13485-certified manufacturers and full documentation packs for hospital compliance audits.

items.title: Flexible Delivery
items.description: Delivery direct to your central stores or multiple site locations across your hospital network.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: A dedicated contact manages your orders from quote to delivery, reducing administrative burden.
